title: buildah inspect Shell and ArgsEscaped are not filled in
body:
During conformance testing it was discovered:

That buildah inspect does not show any values in the ArgsEscaped or Shell variables when they are filled in for Docker images.

Per Yiqiao Pu

[1] https://github.com/ypu/buildah/tree/conformance

comments.body: Closing as this is a dup of https://github.com/projectatomic/buildah/issues/953
